title: [CoreToFSM] Error out when clocks are used outside regs

features.name: clock signal connected to module output port
features.description: Code should include a clock signal that is directly assigned to or connected with a module output port

features.name: clock signal passed as submodule instance port
features.description: Code should include a clock signal that is passed as an argument to a submodule instance's port

features.name: clock signal used in combinational logic expression
features.description: Code should include a clock signal used inside a combinational logic expression such as an assignment or conditional

features.name: clock typed signal connected to module output port
features.description: Code should include a clock typed signal that is directly connected to or drives a module output port

features.name: clock signal passed as submodule input
features.description: Code should include a clock signal passed as an argument to an instantiated submodule

features.name: register clocked while clock has non-register uses
features.description: Code should include a register clocked by a signal that is also used elsewhere in the design, such as in assignments or port connections
